description: Multifragment. Bottom fragment: Account, possibly fiscal, in Arabic. Mentions names followed by numbers. E.g. ʿAlī b. Bū Jumʿa(?), 13 dinars(?); Maḥfūẓ b. M[...]; Barakāt b. Khiḍr: 1 dinar. Reused for Hebrew literary text on recto. Merits further examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
